SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CCSF OFFICE OF THE TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY K. DAVID L. DONAHUE, JR., SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DANIEL COSIE-BENITEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
